title: Mauritius Application for a Visa for Mauritius / Demande de Visa pour Maurice
description: The Passport and Immigration Office's bilingual (English/French) "Application for a Visa for Mauritius / Demande de Visa pour Maurice", distributed directly and unauthenticated from the Office's own domain as a single-page image-only PDF. Picked up from GOV-4603's/GOV-4610's own banked Known Gaps candidate (GOV-4617, "GovSchema Standard Research"): Mauritius was opened as the registry's 92nd jurisdiction via Passport (GOV-4603), with Business Formation and Visa banked as further STRONG open backlog; this schema authors Visa. Opens Mauritius's Visa vertical (3/6) — Business Formation remains open, STRONG banked backlog. This schema does not submit the application itself; the live source is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Mauritius or its Passport and Immigration Office.

source.documentRef: APPLICATION FOR A VISA FOR MAURITIUS / DEMANDE DE VISA POUR MAURICE

verification.notes: See VERIFICATION.md for the full write-up: source fetch/hash, extraction method, document structure, and scoping judgment calls (unmarked required/optional convention, ungated conditional sections).

steps.title: Particulars of Passport or Other Travel Document

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.sourceRef: Personal Particulars — "Title (Mr. Mrs. Miss) / Titre (M. Mme Mlle)"

fields.name: surname
fields.label: Surname
fields.sourceRef: Personal Particulars — "Surname / Nom de Famille"

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First Name(s)
fields.sourceRef: Personal Particulars — "First Name (s) / Prénom (s)"

fields.name: maidenName
fields.label: Maiden Name
fields.description: Applicable to married women, per the form's own printed label. This form carries no marital-status or sex field to gate this on (unlike mu/pio/passport-application's own maritalStatus field), so it is left unconditioned to match the source's own layout.
fields.sourceRef: Personal Particulars — "Maiden Name / Nom de Jeune Fille"

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.sourceRef: Personal Particulars — "Date of Birth / Date de Naissance" (segmented D J M M Y A box grid)

fields.name: profession
fields.label: Profession
fields.sourceRef: Personal Particulars — "Profession" (same row as Date of Birth)

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Country of Birth
fields.sourceRef: Personal Particulars — "Country of Birth / Pays de Naissance"

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nationality
fields.sourceRef: Personal Particulars — "Nationality / Nationalité" (same row as Country of Birth)

fields.name: permanentAddress
fields.label: Permanent Address
fields.description: The source prints this as a two-row box grid (a continuation line beneath the labelled row); modelled here as one field matching the address's own single logical value.
fields.sourceRef: Personal Particulars — "Permanent Address / Adresse Permanente"

fields.name: permanentTelephoneNumber
fields.label: Telephone Number (Permanent Address)
fields.description: Distinct from the second telephone-number field collected later under Particulars of Visit for the Mauritius address.
fields.sourceRef: Personal Particulars — "☎ Tel." (row beneath Permanent Address)

fields.name: faxNumber
fields.label: Fax Number
fields.sourceRef: Personal Particulars — "Fax Number / Numéro de Fax"

fields.name: emailAddress
fields.label: E-mail
fields.sourceRef: Personal Particulars — "E-mail" (same row as Fax Number)

fields.name: residencePermitDateOfIssue
fields.label: Residence Permit: Date of Issue
fields.description: Applicable only for a person not residing in his/her country of origin, per this section's own printed heading; the form provides no separate yes/no discriminator field to gate on, so this section is left unconditioned to match the source's own layout.
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Residence Permit (For person not residing in his/her country of origin) — "Date of Issue / Date de Délivrance" (segmented D J M M Y A box grid)

fields.name: residencePermitDateOfExpiry
fields.label: Residence Permit: Date of Expiry
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Residence Permit — "Date of Expiry / Date d'Expiration" (segmented D J M M Y A box grid)

fields.name: travelDocumentType
fields.label: Type of Document
fields.description: Free-text box grid with no printed options (e.g. "Passport"), unlike an enumerated checkbox list.
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Passport or Other Travel Document / Details du Passeport ou Autre Document de Voyage — "Type of Document / Type de Document"

fields.name: travelDocumentNumber
fields.label: Document Number
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Passport or Other Travel Document — "Number / Numéro"

fields.name: travelDocumentCountryOfIssue
fields.label: Country of Issue
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Passport or Other Travel Document — "Country of Issue / Pays de Délivrance"

fields.name: travelDocumentDateOfIssue
fields.label: Document: Date of Issue
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Passport or Other Travel Document — "Date of Issue / Date de Délivrance" (segmented D J M M Y A box grid)

fields.name: travelDocumentDateOfExpiry
fields.label: Document: Date of Expiry
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Passport or Other Travel Document — "Date of Expiry / Date d'Expiration" (segmented D J M M Y A box grid)

fields.name: purposeOfVisit
fields.label: Purpose of Visit
fields.description: Free-text box grid with no printed options.
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Visit / Details Concernant la Visite — "Purpose of Visit / Motif de la Visite"

fields.name: durationOfStay
fields.label: Duration of Stay
fields.description: The source provides a short box grid with no printed unit (e.g. days vs. months); modelled as free text rather than asserting a unit the form does not itself state.
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Visit — "Duration of Stay / Durée du Séjour"

fields.name: hasTransitEntryPermit
fields.label: In the Case of Transit, Do You Have a Permit to Enter the Country of Your Final Destination?
fields.description: Applicable only where the purpose of visit is transit; the form's purposeOfVisit field is free text rather than an enumerated/checkbox field, so there is no structured value to gate this on, and it is left unconditioned to match the source's own layout.
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Visit — "In the case of transit, do you have a permit to enter the country of your final destination? Yes [ ] No [ ]"

fields.name: expectedDateOfTravel
fields.label: Expected Date of Travel
fields.description: This box grid carries visual day/month/year grouping dividers but, unlike the form's other date fields, no printed D/J/M/M/Y/A letter labels.
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Visit — "Expected Date of Travel"

fields.name: flightNumber
fields.label: Flight Number
fields.description: Not always known at the time of application (e.g. before a flight is booked); the form does not mark this conditional, but it is modelled as optional given its dependence on a booking that may postdate the application.
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Visit — "Flight No. / No. de Vol" (same row as Expected Date of Travel)

fields.name: addressInMauritius
fields.label: Address in Mauritius
fields.description: The source prints this as a two-row box grid (a continuation line beneath the labelled row); modelled here as one field matching the address's own single logical value.
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Visit — "Address in Mauritius / Adresse à Maurice"

fields.name: mauritiusTelephoneNumber
fields.label: Telephone Number (Address in Mauritius)
fields.description: Distinct from the earlier permanentTelephoneNumber field collected under Personal Particulars.
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Visit — "☎ Tel." (row beneath Address in Mauritius)

fields.name: financialMeansAmount
fields.label: Financial Means for Your Upkeep During Your Stay
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Visit — "Financial Means for your Upkeep during your Stay / Moyens Financiers couvrant votre Dépenses durant votre Séjour"

fields.name: financialMeansCurrency
fields.label: Indicate Currency
fields.description: Free-text box grid with no printed currency options (unlike some other registry forms' fixed-currency checkbox lists).
fields.sourceRef: Particulars of Visit — "Indicate Currency / Indiquez la Devise" (same row as Financial Means)

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Date
fields.sourceRef: Declaration — "Date" (segmented D J M M Y A box grid)

fields.name: declarationSignature
fields.label: Signature
fields.sourceRef: Declaration — "Signature"

documents.label: Two Recent Photographs
documents.sourceRef: Top-right corner box — "TO SUBMIT TWO PHOTOS. / A SOUMETTRE DEUX PHOTOS."
